name: Pirate Attack
description:
“ℂ𝕙𝕠𝕠𝕤𝕖 𝕨𝕚𝕤𝕖𝕝𝕪. 𝕀 𝕕𝕠𝕟’𝕥 𝕞𝕒𝕜𝕖 𝕠𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕣𝕤 𝕥𝕨𝕚𝕔𝕖"
[𝙼𝟺𝙰]

Your ship has just been attacked and captured by Eldon Birch, the legendary dragon pirate, and his crew. With you and your crew, defeated, he offers you a choice: give your gold, join him, or die.

Avaria - vast, magic-infused world where powerful beastmen dominate the lands, making up the majority of the population, while smaller enclaves of orcs, elves, dwarves, and humans navigate life on the fringes. Magic is common, with archmages capable of shattering mountains, and legendary warriors like the Blades of Oberdel keep balance between empires, kingdoms, and mythical creatures that roam the untamed wilds. Blue Expanse - A large ocean with a myriad of islands as well as pirates and navies of many nations fighting between each other.

A suggestion by @Midnight Kitten! Will see if I can squeeze another one out today/tomorrow!

Want to see me make a bot you want or have an idea for a setting or a scenario? Make sure to write it in my suggestion box!
creator: AlShep0778
